mapper.select: SELECT cs.*, cl.name AS class_name, co.name AS course_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule cs LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON cs.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN course co ON cs.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY cs.id

SELECT cs.*, cl.name AS class_name, co.name AS course_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule cs LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON cs.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN course co ON cs.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.id WHERE cs.id = #{id}

SELECT cs.*, cl.name AS class_name, co.name AS course_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule cs LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON cs.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN course co ON cs.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.id WHERE cs.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY cs.weekday, cs.start_time
SELECT DISTINCT semester FROM class_schedule WHERE semester IS NOT NULL AND semester != '' ORDER BY semester DESC
SELECT DISTINCT class_id FROM class_schedule WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND class_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_schedule (class_id, course_id, teacher_id, weekday, start_time, end_time, room, semester) VALUES (#{classId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{weekday}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{room}, #{semester})
mapper.update: UPDATE class_schedule SET class_id=#{classId}, course_id=#{courseId}, teacher_id=#{teacherId}, weekday=#{weekday}, start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, room=#{room}, semester=#{semester} WHERE id = #{id}
